title: Magos
tier: Senior — specialist master of a Mechanicus discipline
specialty: Domain varies by Divisio: Biologis, Logis, Fabricator, Reductor, Xenologis, and more
lore: A Magos is a senior Tech-Priest who has mastered a specific domain of knowledge within the Mechanicus. The title indicates decades or centuries of study, countless augmentation procedures, and advancement through Mechanicus political hierarchies.

Each Magos belongs to a Divisio that defines their specialisation. A Magos Biologis studies organic life; a Magos Fabricator oversees industrial production; a Magos Reductor accompanies armies to tear apart fortifications and salvage technology from the battlefield.

By the time a Tech-Priest achieves the rank of Magos, little of their original biological form remains. Their minds are latticed with cognitive implants, their memories stored on data-crystals, and their sensory apparatus replaced entirely with mechanical equivalents of far greater precision.
